title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 15 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 15 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 15 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 15/12/2022
DCE iron ore futures open lower and go higher. the main contract I2305 closed 830. an increase of 3.23% throughout the day.some traders were active to sell, but some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high.
